steps.title: Choose two points on the line
steps.content: The line of best fit decreases as $x$ increases, so the slope is negative. Two approximate points on the line are $(1,12)$ and $(11,4)$.

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content:
Use change in $y$ divided by change in $x$:
$$m=\frac{4-12}{11-1}=\frac{-8}{10}=-0.8$$
The answer is B.
